experiments.paper_title: Creating Large Language Model Applications Utilizing LangChain: A Primer on Developing LLM Apps Fast
experiments.key_results: Elucidates the potential of LangChain in fostering the swift development of LLM-based applications through practical examples.

experiments.paper_title: Revolutionizing Mental Health Care through LangChain: A Journey with a Large Language Model
experiments.key_results: MindGuide, an innovative chatbot serving as a mental health assistant for early detection and comprehensive support. This novel approach holds great promise for proactive mental health intervention and assistance.

experiments.paper_title: Automating Customer Service using LangChain: Building custom open-source GPT Chatbot for organizations
experiments.key_results: Sahaay demonstrates the ability to scale across industries and organizations, offering real-time support and query resolution, particularly within an educational institution. Redefines the customer-company relationship, elevating customer retention, value extraction, and brand image.

experiments.paper_title: Efficiency-Driven Custom Chatbot Development: Unleashing LangChain, RAG, and Performance-Optimized LLM Fusion

experiments.key_results: Improved CVD prediction accuracy. Unlocks valuable insights into the disease’s progression, empowering healthcare professionals with knowledge to implement early interventions and improve patient care and outcomes.
